initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Daytona
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Daytona Beach. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: PFLAG DeLand/Volusia
initiatives.description: Offering support meetings every month to our LGBTQIAP+ community, their family members, & allies.

initiatives.name: Volusia Giving Gardens
initiatives.description: Student-led food equity initiative creating access to fresh produce through community gardens
